data.name: Galactic Sex Odyssey: NSFW Sci-Fi Porn
data.detailed_description:
This Visual Novel is designed to be a relaxing experience.

Are you tired of grindy VNs that use the "sandbox" excuse to extend playtime?

Nervous you'll miss the story/scenes you would enjoy most because of a dialogue option you picked wrong?

Then this is the right AVN for you!

Galactic Sex Odyssey is designed to be a chill, relaxing experience that you can enjoy with NO grinding, and without a walkthrough.

It is a linear experience, so you can just relax and you won't miss a single scene, even if you only play it through once!

Don't worry when picking dialog responses, you'll get to experience everything on your first playthrough.

So just sit back, relax, and ENGAGE!

If you're looking for a grind, multiple paths accessible through obscure choices, and other headaches, this is NOT the VN for you.

Explore the Galaxy and meet new species of sexy aliens

Embark on an epic porn adventure and explore its rich universe filled with slutty species!

In this adult visual novel, you will play as an explorer looking for lost Human civilizations across the galaxy. 
Meet their sexy leaders, seduce and be seduced by beautiful women, but be careful, getting involved in alien politics can have unpredictable results...

Easy to play and replay

NO GRINDING.

Just sit back and relax. Pick the dialogue options you like best without fear of missing out.

The sex scene gallery allows you to easily relive your favorite sex scenes.

  • MILF / GILF

  • Anal

  • Pregnancy

  • Slave girl

  • Maledom

  • FFM, FFFM

  • Bimbofication

  • Religion

  • Voyeurism

  • Cumplay

  • BDSM

  • Ahegao

data.short_description: Galactic Sex Odyssey is an Adult Visual Novel focusing on exploring the final frontier. The game is packed with sex, romance, and sexy aliens.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6-10.14
  • 處理器: 1 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Game is non-notarized. May not work with 10.15 Catalina

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu / SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
